@pytest.mark.integration def test_toy_package_extras(): """Test using edgetest with a toy package.""" with pytest.raises(SystemExit): # Expecting a SystemExit from cli > with runner.isolated_filesystem() as loc: ^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'runner' is not defined

@patch("edgetest.lib.EnvBuilder", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.core.Popen", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.utils.Popen", autospec=True) def test_cli_basic(mock_popen, mock_cpopen, mock_builder): """Test creating a basic environment.""" mock_popen.return_value.communicate.return_value = (PIP_LIST, "error") type(mock_popen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0) mock_cpopen.return_value.communicate.return_value = ("output", "error") type(mock_cpopen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0)

@patch("edgetest.lib.EnvBuilder", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.core.Popen", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.utils.Popen", autospec=True) def test_cli_reqs(mock_popen, mock_cpopen, mock_builder): """Test running tests based on the requirements file.""" mock_popen.return_value.communicate.return_value = (PIP_LIST, "error") type(mock_popen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0) mock_cpopen.return_value.communicate.return_value = ("output", "error") type(mock_cpopen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0)
with patch("edgetest.interface.cli") as cli: with open("requirements.txt", "w") as outfile: outfile.write(REQS)
result = cli()
if platform.system() == "Windows": py_myupgrade_loc = ( Path(".edgetest") / "myupgrade" / "Scripts" / "python.exe" ) py_allreq_loc = ( Path(".edgetest") / "all-requirements" / "Scripts" / "python.exe" ) else: py_myupgrade_loc = Path(".edgetest") / "myupgrade" / "bin" / "python" py_allreq_loc = Path(".edgetest") / "all-requirements" / "bin" / "python"

@patch("edgetest.lib.EnvBuilder", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.core.Popen", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.utils.Popen", autospec=True) def test_cli_setup_reqs_update(mock_popen, mock_cpopen, mock_builder): """Test running tests and updating requirements in a ``pyproject.toml`` file.""" mock_popen.return_value.communicate.return_value = (PIP_LIST, "error") type(mock_popen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0) mock_cpopen.return_value.communicate.return_value = ("output", "error") type(mock_cpopen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0)

result = cli(["--config=pyproject.toml", "--export"])

@patch("edgetest.lib.EnvBuilder", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.utils.Popen", autospec=True) def test_cli_notest(mock_popen, mock_builder): """Test creating a basic environment.""" mock_popen.return_value.communicate.return_value = (PIP_LIST, "error") type(mock_popen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0)
with patch("edgetest.interface.cli") as cli: with open("pyproject.toml", "w") as outfile: outfile.write(SETUP_TOML)
result = cli(["--config=pyproject.toml", "--notest"])
> assert result.exit_code == 0 E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='cli().exit_code' id='4712411024'> == 0 E + where <MagicMock name='cli().exit_code' id='4712411024'> = <MagicMock name='cli()' id='4712411360'>.exit_code

testcase.failure:
mock_popen = <MagicMock name='Popen' spec='Popen' id='4712410016'> mock_builder = <MagicMock name='EnvBuilder' spec='EnvBuilder' id='4707809808'>
@patch("edgetest.lib.EnvBuilder", autospec=True) @patch("edgetest.utils.Popen", autospec=True) def test_cli_notest_lower(mock_popen, mock_builder): """Test creating a basic environment.""" mock_popen.return_value.communicate.return_value = (PIP_LIST, "error") type(mock_popen.return_value).returncode = PropertyMock(return_value=0)
with patch("edgetest.interface.cli") as cli: with open("pyproject.toml", "w") as outfile: outfile.write(SETUP_TOML_LOWER)
result = cli(["--config=pyproject.toml", "--notest"])
> assert result.exit_code == 0 E AssertionError: assert <MagicMock name='cli().exit_code' id='4707128992'> == 0 E + where <MagicMock name='cli().exit_code' id='4707128992'> = <MagicMock name='cli()' id='4707128656'>.exit_code
